notes: Saudi Arabia are near full strength with only Nawaf Al-Aqidi (muscle) confirmed out and coach Donis reporting a largely healthy squad; Salem Al-Dawsari leads the line as captain. Uruguay face a severe defensive injury crisis: Ronald Araujo is effectively ruled out (calf), Jose Gimenez is a major doubt (ankle), Matias Vina is managing a muscle issue, and de Arrascaeta carries a minor knock — forcing Bielsa into significant defensive reshuffling.
